$comment: Claude Code plugin manifest — empirically validated against the official schema (2.1.170). agents/, skills/, hooks/ are auto-discovered by convention (no `components` field exists); hook wiring lives in hooks/hooks.json; `settings`/`requirements` are not real manifest fields (tool prerequisites — jq, gh, bash, git — are checked by `ai-pipe preflight` and documented in README).
name: ai-pipe-core
description: Multi-agent automation pipeline: PM/Architect/Backend/Frontend/Infra/QA/Test/Reviewer/Verifier/Project-Ops agents, with PreToolUse safety hooks and GitHub Issues/Projects V2 integration via the GitHub MCP server (gh CLI fallback). Requires jq, gh, bash, git on PATH (run `ai-pipe preflight`).
